title: Jetking is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Jetking is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Jetking, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jetking:
Jetking is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jetking!
